description: Python pre-computed golden phonemes for byte-for-byte cross-runtime parity tests. Generated by piper_plus_g2p.MultilingualPhonemizer. Kotlin / Rust / Go / WASM / C# / C++ runtimes assert string equality against `expected_phonemes`.

test_cases.description: Simple English word — basic g2p-en pipeline test
test_cases.expected_phonemes: h ə l ˈ o ʊ

test_cases.description: English sentence with function word stress removal (the)
test_cases.expected_phonemes: ð ə   k w ˈ ɪ k   b ɹ ˈ a ʊ n   f ˈ ɑ k s   d ʒ ˈ ʌ m p s .

test_cases.description: English with contraction and multi-word sentence
test_cases.expected_phonemes: ʃ ˈ i ː z   ɹ ˈ ɛ d ɪ ŋ   ə   b ˈ ʊ k .

test_cases.description: Chinese greeting (ni3 hao3) — tests pypinyin pipeline and tone markers
test_cases.expected_phonemes: n i tone2 x aʊ tone3

test_cases.description: Chinese sentence with punctuation — tests multi-syllable processing
test_cases.expected_phonemes: p eɪ tone3 tɕ iŋ tone1 x uan tone1 iŋ tone2 n i tone3

test_cases.description: Chinese sentence with tone 3 sandhi (wo3 shi4) — tests tone marker output
test_cases.expected_phonemes: uo tone3 ʂ ɻ̩ tone4 ɕ yɛ tone2 ʂ əŋ tone1

test_cases.description: Chinese multi-syllable repeat (xie4 xie4); char-based JS: 2 chars
test_cases.expected_phonemes: ɕ iɛ tone4 ɕ iɛ tone4

test_cases.description: Chinese 3-character word; char-based JS: 3 chars
test_cases.expected_phonemes: tʂ uŋ tone1 k uo tone2 ɻ ən tone2

test_cases.description: Chinese mixed CJK + Latin script; char-based JS: 7 chars
test_cases.expected_phonemes: aɪ tone1 tʂʰ ɻ̩ tone4 i tone1 aɪ tone1 ɚ tone2 aɪ tone1 ɚ tone2 oʊ tone1 n i tone2 x aʊ tone3

test_cases.description: Chinese digit characters; char-based JS: 3 chars
test_cases.expected_phonemes: i tone2 ɚ tone4 s an tone1

test_cases.description: Chinese punctuation-only input; char-based JS: 3 chars
Chinese numeric input — passed through; char-based JS: 3 chars
test_cases.expected_phonemes: w ˈ ʌ n   h ˈ ʌ n d ɹ ə d   t w ˈ ɛ n t i ː θ ɹ i ː

test_cases.description: Chinese 6-character sentence (no punctuation); char-based JS: 6 chars
test_cases.expected_phonemes: tɕ in tone1 tʰ iɛn tone1 tʰ iɛn tone1 tɕʰ i tone4 x ən tone2 x aʊ tone3

test_cases.expected_phonemes: ɡ ˈ ɑ d   m ˈ ɔ ː ɹ ɡ ə n   s v ˈ ɛ ɹ ɪ d ʒ .

test_cases.description: Swedish common word — short a before ck geminate (ck -> k), stress marker
test_cases.expected_phonemes: t ˈ æ k

test_cases.description: Swedish compound word — short ä (ɛ) before cluster, short o (ɔ) before mm geminate
test_cases.expected_phonemes: v ˈ æ l k ə m ɛ n

test_cases.description: Swedish country name — long e (eː) before single r, soft g before front vowel -> j
test_cases.expected_phonemes: s v ˈ ɛ ɹ ɪ d ʒ

test_cases.description: Swedish sk + front vowel ö -> sj-sound (ɧ), long ö (øː) before single n

test_cases.expected_phonemes: l ˈ u ː d ʒ ɪ z

test_cases.description: Swedish retroflex assimilation — rt -> ʈ, short o (ɔ) before cluster
test_cases.expected_phonemes: k ˈ ɔ ː ɹ t

test_cases.description: Swedish retroflex assimilation — rn -> ɳ, long a (ɑː) before r+single C
test_cases.expected_phonemes: b ˈ ɑ ː ɹ n

test_cases.description: Swedish hard k exception — k before i stays /k/ (in HARD_K_WORDS), short i (ɪ)
test_cases.expected_phonemes: f l ˈ ɪ k ə

test_cases.description: Swedish loanword -tion suffix -> sj-sound (ɧ) + long u (uː) + n, stress on suffix
test_cases.expected_phonemes: s t ˈ e ɪ ʃ ə n
